name: @bc8-odx/workspace
description: ODX: OData Developer Experience - A modern toolkit for SAP OData integration

scripts.dev:prepare: pnpm --filter @bc8-odx/nuxt dev:prepare && nuxi prepare playground && nuxi prepare packages/explorer && nuxi prepare docs
scripts.examples: pnpm run example:core && pnpm run example:proxy
scripts.verify:packages: pnpm --filter @bc8-odx/metadata run verify && pnpm --filter @bc8-odx/core run verify && pnpm --filter @bc8-odx/proxy run verify && pnpm --filter @bc8-odx/nuxt run verify && pnpm --filter @bc8-odx/explorer run verify && pnpm --filter odx-approuter run verify && pnpm --filter docs run verify
scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit && pnpm --filter @bc8-odx/explorer typecheck && pnpm --filter docs typecheck
scripts.test:unit: vitest run packages/metadata packages/core packages/proxy packages/explorer
scripts.build:packages: pnpm --filter @bc8-odx/metadata build && pnpm --filter @bc8-odx/core build && pnpm --filter @bc8-odx/proxy build && pnpm --filter @bc8-odx/explorer build && pnpm --filter @bc8-odx/nuxt build
scripts.verify: pnpm run lint && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run verify:packages && pnpm run verify:publishing
scripts.build:deployment: pnpm --filter @bc8-odx/explorer build && pnpm --filter @bc8-odx/proxy build:runtime && shx cp -f packages/explorer/.output/server/package.json packages/explorer/.output/package.json && shx cp -f packages/proxy/.output/server/package.json packages/proxy/.output/package.json && mbt build -t mta_archives --mtar odx-fullstack.mtar
